title: The French Dispatch
writer: Wes Anderson, Roman Coppola, Hugo Guinness
actors: Benicio Del Toro, Adrien Brody, Tilda Swinton
plot: A collection of stories published in "The French Dispatch Magazine" comes to life in a fictional twentieth century French city.
country: United States, Germany, Sweden, France, United Kingdom
awards: Nominated for 3 BAFTA 25 wins & 123 nominations total
